name: Integration - End-to-End FSR Workflow with Escalation
description: Tests the full agent workflow including escalation when flagged_terms are present and script_direction is 'rtl', ensuring escalation logic and audit logging are triggered.
input: POST request to /process_fsr with extracted_fsr containing segments that will result in low confidence scores and script_direction set to 'rtl'.
output: FSRProcessResponse with success=false, output containing empty english_body and confidence, flagged_terms present, error message indicating escalation.
success_criteria: response.error contains 'escalated to the safety-review human-in-loop queue'
